description: Convert between different currencies using real-time exchange rates.

from_currency.description: The source currency code (3-letter ISO code, e.g., 'EUR', 'USD', 'GBP')

to_currency.description: The target currency code (3-letter ISO code, e.g., 'EUR', 'USD', 'GBP')

amount.description: The amount to convert from the source currency to the target currency
